name: RPlog_Mandalore_-_Departure
title: Mandalore: Departure
summary: As the expedition prepares to leave the Mandalore military complex aboard the ship Quasar Bolt, the warriors Dane Noth and Kairne board to see the Corellian Paul Nighman and his companion Shenner off. The Mandalorians and the offworlders exchange easy banter and the ritual 'Nava Choi' greetings, with Dane asking to borrow a long-range transmitter for later use. While Dane and Kairne settle in, Shenner studies a Mandalorian language lesson and fields good-natured ribbing about her dialect and her interest in xenoarchaeology, the older warriors treating her with growing warmth. Kairne pays Shenner the rare honor of comparing her to his own kin, and Paul later explains the deep significance of a Mandalorian choosing to show his unhelmeted face. With farewells made and bonds quietly strengthened, the group sets off, Shenner moved by the unexpected acceptance she has found among the warriors of Mandalore.
